title: crassula natans
intro: Crassula natans, also known as the water-storing stonecrop or water jade plant, is a succulent species of flowering plant in the family Crassulaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The health benefits of Crassula natans include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with some herbalists recommending its use in the form of a topical cream or salve to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
